요한일서 3:1.content: See how great a love the Father has given to us, that we should be called children of God! For this cause the world doesn’t know us, because it didn’t know him.

요한일서 3:2.content: Beloved, now we are children of God. It is not yet revealed what we will be; but we know that when he is revealed, we will be like him; for we will see him just as he is.

요한일서 3:3.content: Everyone who has this hope set on him purifies himself, even as he is pure.

요한일서 3:4.content: Everyone who sins also commits lawlessness. Sin is lawlessness.

요한일서 3:5.content: You know that he was revealed to take away our sins, and no sin is in him.

요한일서 3:6.content: Whoever remains in him doesn’t sin. Whoever sins hasn’t seen him and doesn’t know him.

요한일서 3:7.content: Little children, let no one lead you astray. He who does righteousness is righteous, even as he is righteous.

요한일서 3:8.content: He who sins is of the devil, for the devil has been sinning from the beginning. To this end the Son of God was revealed: that he might destroy the works of the devil.

요한일서 3:9.content: Whoever is born of God doesn’t commit sin, because his seed remains in him, and he can’t sin, because he is born of God.

요한일서 3:10.content: In this the children of God are revealed, and the children of the devil. Whoever doesn’t do righteousness is not of God, neither is he who doesn’t love his brother.

요한일서 3:11.content: For this is the message which you heard from the beginning, that we should love one another;

요한일서 3:12.content: unlike Cain, who was of the evil one, and killed his brother. Why did he kill him? Because his deeds were evil, and his brother’s righteous.

요한일서 3:13.content: Don’t be surprised, my brothers, if the world hates you.

요한일서 3:14.content: We know that we have passed out of death into life, because we love the brothers. He who doesn’t love his brother remains in death.

요한일서 3:15.content: Whoever hates his brother is a murderer, and you know that no murderer has eternal life remaining in him.

요한일서 3:16.content: By this we know love, because he laid down his life for us. And we ought to lay down our lives for the brothers.

요한일서 3:17.content: But whoever has the world’s goods and sees his brother in need, then closes his heart of compassion against him, how does God’s love remain in him?

요한일서 3:18.content: My little children, let’s not love in word only, or with the tongue only, but in deed and truth.

요한일서 3:19.content: And by this we know that we are of the truth, and persuade our hearts before him,

요한일서 3:20.content: because if our heart condemns us, God is greater than our heart, and knows all things.

요한일서 3:21.content: Beloved, if our hearts don’t condemn us, we have boldness toward God;

요한일서 3:22.content: so whatever we ask, we receive from him, because we keep his commandments and do the things that are pleasing in his sight.

요한일서 3:23.content: This is his commandment, that we should believe in the name of his Son, Jesus Christ, and love one another, even as he commanded.

요한일서 3:24.content: He who keeps his commandments remains in him, and he in him. By this we know that he remains in us, by the Spirit which he gave us.
